root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.approve_date, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_status, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no) as memname FROM sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control, sc_mem_m_application_form, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.approve_date >= '1/1/2021' ) ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.recrieve_status, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee, sc_mem_m_member_reg_no_control.membership_no
